method: scalar value-function surrogate with fixed-point value register and reversible threshold-comparator simulation

oracle_decomposition.value_register: compute a fixed-point approximation of V_theta(x,u) into an integer value register
oracle_decomposition.threshold_comparator: mark if feasible(x) and value_register <= tau_register
oracle_decomposition.uncompute: reverse value-register and feasibility computations after phase marking
